description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a wooden fixed stock, wooden handguard, and a curved detachable box magazine. The receiver and barrel are constructed from dark metal, giving it a robust and utilitarian appearance. The rifle features traditional iron sights, with a front post and a rear notch, both mounted on the top of the barrel and receiver. The magazine is prominently curved and made of metal, designed to hold multiple rounds. The muzzle end of the barrel is fitted with a simple slotted flash hider. The overall design is iconic, reminiscent of the AK-47, and is well-suited for rugged urban environments.
description: A classic assault rifle with a wooden stock and handguard, dark metal receiver and barrel, and a curved detachable magazine. It features iron sights and a slotted flash hider at the muzzle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the wooden stock, handguard, and curved magazine.
description_view_1: Front view focusing on the muzzle, front sight, and the curvature of the magazine.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, receiver, and the wooden components in profile.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the buttstock, rear sight, and the alignment of the magazine and barrel.
